workouts: address review feedback on ExerciseCard

- Switch range sliders to onChange so DB writes only fire when the
  user releases the slider, avoiding jank from per-pixel onInput writes.
- Add aria-pressed to difficulty toggles so screen readers can announce
  which option is currently selected.
EOF
)" && git push

input.command: gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/73/comments/3263050085/replies -f body='Done — switched the failed-set slider to onChange so the IndexedDB write only fires when the user releases the slider instead of on every pixel of drag.'
gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/73/comments/3263050094/replies -f body='Done — same change applied to the failed-rep slider; onChange defers the write until the slider is released.'

content.text:
All three review comments addressed and replied to. Summary:

- **Sliders (2 comments)**: Switched `onInput` → `onChange` on both range inputs in `src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx`, so IndexedDB writes only fire when the user releases the slider.
- **Accessibility**: Added `aria-pressed={selected}` to each difficulty toggle button.
- Build (`tsc -b && vite build`) passes; all 14 Playwright tests pass.
- Pushed as commit `b3045dc` on `agent/20260518-2052-ed7f37b9`; replied to each of the three comments.

result:
All three review comments addressed and replied to. Summary:

- **Sliders (2 comments)**: Switched `onInput` → `onChange` on both range inputs in `src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx`, so IndexedDB writes only fire when the user releases the slider.
- **Accessibility**: Added `aria-pressed={selected}` to each difficulty toggle button.
- Build (`tsc -b && vite build`) passes; all 14 Playwright tests pass.
- Pushed as commit `b3045dc` on `agent/20260518-2052-ed7f37b9`; replied to each of the three comments.
